SELECT duration, to_years(duration) AS year_interval FROM years_test;
SELECT *, (SELECT to_years(duration) FROM years_test WHERE duration = 10) AS ten_years_interval FROM years_test;
WITH year_intervals AS (SELECT duration, to_years(duration) AS year_interval FROM years_test) SELECT * FROM year_intervals WHERE year_interval >= to_years(5);
CREATE TABLE event_log (event_id INTEGER, event_duration INTEGER);
SELECT e.event_id, to_years(e.event_duration) AS duration_in_years FROM event_log e JOIN years_test y ON e.event_duration = y.duration;
SELECT e.event_id, to_years(e.event_duration + 2) AS extended_duration FROM event_log e WHERE e.event_duration + 2 < 10;
SELECT e.event_id, to_years(e.event_duration) + 1 AS adjusted_duration FROM event_log e WHERE e.event_duration >= 5;
